verses.geez: አሌፍ። አነ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘይሬኢ፡ ተፅናሰ፡ በበትረ፡ መዐቱ።

translations.lxx: Aleph. I am the man that sees poverty, through the rod of his wrath upon me.
translations.kjv: I AM the man that hath seen affliction by the rod of his wrath.

verses.geez: ነሥአኒ፡ ወወሰደኒ፡ ውስተ፡ ጽልመት፡ ዘአልቦ፡ ብርሃን።

translations.lxx: He has taken me, and led me away into darkness, and not into light.
translations.kjv: He hath led me, and brought me into darkness, but not into light.

verses.geez: ወሜጠ፡ እዴሁ፡ ኀቤየ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዕለተ።

translations.lxx: Nay, against me has he turned his hand all the day.
translations.kjv: Surely against me is he turned; he turneth his hand against me all the day.

verses.geez: በልየ፡ ሥጋየ፡ ወማእስየ፡ ወተቀጥቀጠ፡ አዕፅምትየ።

translations.lxx: He has made old my flesh and my skin; he has broken my bones.
translations.kjv: My flesh and my skin hath he made old; he hath broken my bones.

verses.geez: ቤት። ሐነጸ፡ ጥቅመ፡ ላዕለ፡ ርእስየ። ወሰርሐ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ሕማም፡ ላዕሌየ።

translations.lxx: Beth. He has built against me, and compassed my head, and brought travail upon me.
translations.kjv: He hath builded against me, and compassed me with gall and travail.

verses.geez: ወውስተ፡ ጽልመት፡ አንበረኒ፡ ከመ፡ ምዉተ፡ ትካት።

translations.lxx: He has set me in dark places, as them that have long been dead.
translations.kjv: He hath set me in dark places, as they that be dead of old.

verses.geez: ወነደቀ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ወኢይወፅእ፡ ወአክበደ፡ ብርትየ።

translations.lxx: He has builded against me, and I cannot come forth: he has made my brazen chain heavy.
translations.kjv: He hath hedged me about, that I cannot get out: he hath made my chain heavy.

verses.geez: ጋሜል። እጸርሕ፡ ወአአወዩ፡ እስመ፡ ተፈጸመ፡ ጸሎትየ።

translations.lxx: Gimel. Yea, though I cry and shout, he shuts out my prayer.
translations.kjv: Also when I cry and shout, he shutteth out my prayer.

verses.geez: ዳሌጥ። ወሐነጸ፡ ፍኖትየ፡ በኰኵሕ፡ ወዐጸወ፡ ፍኖትየ።

translations.lxx: Daleth. He has built up my ways, he has hedged my paths;
translations.kjv: He hath inclosed my ways with hewn stone, he hath made my paths crooked.

verses.geez: ድብ፡ እንተ፡ ትንዑ፡ ውእቱ፡ ሊተ፡ ወከመ፡ አንበሳ፡ ጽሚተ።

translations.lxx: he has troubled me, as a she-bear lying in wait: he is to me as a lion in secret places.
translations.kjv: He was unto me as a bear lying in wait, and as a lion in secret places.

verses.geez: ዴገነኒ፡ ወአኅለቀኒ፡ ወረሰየኒ፡ ገዳመ።

translations.lxx: He pursued me after I departed, and brought me to a stand: he has utterly ruined me.
translations.kjv: He hath turned aside my ways, and pulled me in pieces: he hath made me desolate.

verses.geez: ሄ። ወሰቀ፡ ቀስቶ፡ ወአቀመኒ፡ ከመ፡ መጠራ፡ ለሐፅ።

translations.lxx: He. He has bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow.
translations.kjv: He hath bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow.

verses.geez: ወነደፈኒ፡ ውስተ፡ ኵልያትየ፡ በአሕፃሁ።

translations.lxx: He has caused the arrows of his quiver to enter into my reins.
translations.kjv: He hath caused the arrows of his quiver to enter into my reins.

verses.geez: ወኮንኩ፡ ሰሐቀ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ሕዝብየ፡ ወየኀልዩኒ፡ ኵሎ፡ አሚረ።

translations.lxx: I became a laughing-stock to all my people; and their song all the day.
translations.kjv: I was a derision to all my people; and their song all the day.

verses.geez: ዋው። አጽገበኒ፡ ሕምዘ፡ ወአርወየኒ፡ ሐሞተ።

translations.lxx: Vau. He has filled me with bitterness, he has drenched me with gall.
translations.kjv: He hath filled me with bitterness, he hath made me drunken with wormwood.

verses.geez: ወሰበረ፡ ስነንየ፡ በኆጻ፡ ወአቅምሐኒ፡ ሐመደ።

translations.lxx: And he has dashed out my teeth with gravel, he has fed me with ashes.
translations.kjv: He hath also broken my teeth with gravel stones, he hath covered me with ashes.

verses.geez: ቀብጸት፡ ነፍስየ፡ ሰላመ፡ ወረሳዕክዋ፡ ለሠናይት።

translations.lxx: He has also removed my soul from peace: I forgot prosperity.
translations.kjv: And thou hast removed my soul far off from peace: I forgat prosperity.

verses.geez: ወሐጐልኩ፡ ተስፋየ፡ ወትውክልትየ፡ በኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: Therefore my success has perished, and my hope from the Lord.
translations.kjv: And I said, My strength and my hope is perished from the LORD:

verses.geez: ዛይ። ተዘከርኩ፡ ተፅናስየ፡ ወተሰዶትየ፡ ወምረተ፡ ሕምዝየ።

translations.lxx: Zain. I remembered by reason of my poverty, and because of persecution my bitterness and gall shall be remembered;
translations.kjv: Remembering mine affliction and my misery, the wormwood and the gall.

verses.geez: ወዐንበዘት፡ ነፍስየ፡ በላዕሌየ።

translations.lxx: and my soul shall meditate with me.
translations.kjv: My soul hath them still in remembrance, and is humbled in me.

verses.geez: ወአነብር፡ ውስተ፡ ልብየ፡ በእተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ እትዔገሥ።

translations.lxx: The Lord is my portion, says my soul; therefore will I wait for him.
translations.kjv: This I recall to my mind, therefore have I hope.

verses.geez: ሔት። ምሕረተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እስመ፡ ኢኀልቀ፡ ወኢተፈጸመ፡ ሣህሉ።

translations.kjv: It is of the LORD’s mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not.

verses.geez: ሐዳሳት፡ ለለ፡ ጽባሕ፡ ብዝኀ፡ ጽድቅከ።

translations.kjv: They are new every morning: great is thy faithfulness.

verses.geez: ክፍልየ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ትቤ፡ ነፍስየ፡ በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ እጸንሕ።

translations.kjv: The LORD is my portion, saith my soul; therefore will I hope in him.

verses.geez: ጤት። ኄር፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለእለ፡ ይትዔገሥዎ።

translations.lxx: Teth. The Lord is good to them that wait for him: the soul which shall seek him
translations.kjv: The LORD is good unto them that wait for him, to the soul that seeketh him.

verses.geez: ለነፍስ፡ እንተ፡ ተኀሥሥ፡ በሠናይ፡ ወትትዔገሥ፡ ወታረምም፡ ለመድኀኒተ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: is good, and shall wait for, and quietly expect salvation of the Lord.
translations.kjv: It is good that a man should both hope and quietly wait for the salvation of the LORD.

verses.geez: ጤት። ሠናይ፡ ለብእሲ፡ ሶበ፡ ይነሥእ፡ አርዑቶ፡ እምንእሱ።

translations.lxx: Teth. It is good for a man when he bears a yoke in his youth.
translations.kjv: It is good for a man that he bear the yoke in his youth.

verses.geez: ወይነብር፡ ባሕቲቱ፡ ወይፃሙ፡ ሶበ፡ አንሥኡ፡ ላዕሌሁ።

translations.lxx: He will sit alone, and be silent, because he has borne it upon him.
translations.kjv: He sitteth alone and keepeth silence, because he hath borne it upon him.

verses.geez: ይወዲ፡ ውስተ፡ መሬት፡ አፉሁ፡ ዮጊ፡ በተስፋ።

translations.kjv: He putteth his mouth in the dust; if so be there may be hope.

verses.geez: ዮድ። ይመይጥ፡ መልታሕቶ፡ ለዘይጸፍዖ፡ ወይጸግብ፡ ጽዕለተ።

translations.lxx: Jod. He will give his cheek to him that smites him: he will be filled full with reproaches.
translations.kjv: He giveth his cheek to him that smiteth him: he is filled full with reproach.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ኢይገድፎሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለዓለም።

translations.lxx: For the Lord will not reject for ever.
translations.kjv: For the LORD will not cast off for ever:

verses.geez: ካፍ። እስመ፡ ዘአሕመመ፡ ይሠሀል፡ በከመ፡ ብዝኀ፡ ምሕረቱ።

translations.lxx: Chaph. For he that has brought down will pity, and that according to the abundance of his mercy.
translations.kjv: But though he cause grief, yet will he have compassion according to the multitude of his mercies.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ኢተቈጥዐ፡ ልቡ፡ ወኢያሕመመ፡ ደቂቀ፡ እጓለ፡ እመሕያው።

translations.lxx: He has not answered in anger from his heart, though he has brought low the children of a man.
translations.kjv: For he doth not afflict willingly nor grieve the children of men.

verses.geez: ላሜድ። ከመ፡ ያኅሥር፡ በታሕተ፡ እገሪሁ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ኅሡራነ፡ ምድር።

translations.lxx: Lamed. To bring down under his feet all the prisoners of the earth,
translations.kjv: To crush under his feet all the prisoners of the earth,

verses.geez: ከመ፡ ይሚጥ፡ ፍትሐ፡ ብእሲ፡ በቅድመ፡ ገጸ፡ ልዑል።

translations.lxx: to turn aside the judgment of a man before the face of the Most High,
translations.kjv: To turn aside the right of a man before the face of the most High,

verses.geez: ይደይ፡ ብእሴ፡ ውስተ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ሶበ፡ ይኴንን፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘኢአዘዘ።

translations.lxx: to condemn a man unjustly in his judgment, the Lord has not given commandment.
translations.kjv: To subvert a man in his cause, the LORD approveth not.

verses.geez: መኑ፡ ዘይቤ፡ ወይከውን፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘኢአዘዘ።

translations.lxx: Who has thus spoken, and it has come to pass? the Lord has not commanded it.
translations.kjv: Who is he that saith, and it cometh to pass, when the Lord commandeth it not?

verses.geez: ወእምአፈ፡ ልዑል፡ ዘኢወፅአ፡ እኩይኒ፡ ወሠናይኒ።

translations.lxx: Out of the mouth of the Most High there shall not come forth evil and good.
translations.kjv: Out of the mouth of the most High proceedeth not evil and good?

verses.geez: ሜም። ለምንት፡ ያንጐረጕር፡ ሰብእ፡ እንዘ፡ ሕያው፡ ብእሲ፡ በእንተ፡ ኀጢአቱ።

translations.lxx: Mem. Why should a living man complain, a man concerning his sin?
translations.kjv: Wherefore doth a living man complain, a man for the punishment of his sins?

verses.geez: ኖን። ንሕትት፡ ፍኖተነ፡ ወንኀሥሦ፡ ወንትመየጥ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: Nun. Our way has been searched out and examined, and we will turn to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to the LORD.

verses.geez: ናንሥእ፡ ልበነ፡ ወእደዊነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሰማየ።

translations.lxx: Let us lift up our hearts with our hands to the lofty One in heaven.
translations.kjv: Let us lift up our heart with our hands unto God in the heavens.

verses.geez: ንሕነ፡ አበስነ፡ ወጌገይነ፡ አንተኒ፡ ኢመሐከነ።

translations.lxx: We have sinned, we have transgressed; and thou hast not pardoned.
translations.kjv: We have transgressed and have rebelled: thou hast not pardoned.

verses.geez: ሳምኬት። ደፈንከነ፡ በመዐትከ፡ ወሰደድከነ፡ ወቀተልከነ፡ ወኢመሐከነ።

translations.lxx: Samech. Thou hast visited us in wrath, and driven us away: thou hast slain, thou hast not pitied.
translations.kjv: Thou hast covered with anger, and persecuted us: thou hast slain, thou hast not pitied.

verses.geez: ጸለልከነ፡ በደመና፡ እምወፂእ፡ ለምዕራገ፡ ጸሎትነ።

translations.lxx: Thou hast veiled thyself with a cloud because of prayer, that I might be blind,
translations.kjv: Thou hast covered thyself with a cloud, that our prayer should not pass through.

verses.geez: ዔ። ከመ፡ ንሕምም፡ ወከመ፡ ኢንርአይ፡ አንበርከነ፡ ማእከለ፡ አሕዛብ።

translations.lxx: and be cast off. Ain. Thou hast set us alone in the midst of the nations.
translations.kjv: Thou hast made us as the offscouring and refuse in the midst of the people.

verses.geez: ከሠቱ፡ አፉሆሙ፡ ላዕሌነ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፀርነ።

translations.lxx: All our enemies have opened their mouth against us.
translations.kjv: All our enemies have opened their mouths against us.

verses.geez: ፍርሃት፡ ወረዓድ፡ አኀዘነ፡ ሙስና፡ ወቅጥቃጤ።

translations.lxx: Fear and wrath are come upon us, suspense and destruction.
translations.kjv: Fear and a snare is come upon us, desolation and destruction.

verses.geez: ፈለገ፡ ማይ፡ ይውሕዝ፡ እምአዕይንቲነ፡ በእንተ፡ ቅጥቃጤሃ፡ ለወለተ፡ ሕዝብየ።

translations.lxx: Mine eye shall pour down torrents of water, for the destruction of the daughter of my people.
translations.kjv: Mine eye runneth down with rivers of water for the destruction of the daughter of my people.

verses.geez: ፌ። ዐይንየ፡ ተደፍነት፡ ወኢያረምም፡ እንከ፡ እምአልዕሎ።

translations.lxx: Phe. Mine eye is drowned with tears, and I will not be silent, so that there shall be no rest,
translations.kjv: Mine eye trickleth down, and ceaseth not, without any intermission,

verses.geez: እስከ፡ ይሬኢ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እምሰማይ።

translations.lxx: until the Lord look down, and behold from heaven.
translations.kjv: Till the LORD look down, and behold from heaven.

verses.geez: ዐይንየ፡ አሕመሞ፡ ለነፍስየ፡ በእንተ፡ ኵሉ፡ አዋልደ፡ ሀገርየ።

translations.lxx: Mine eye shall prey upon my soul, because of all the daughters of the city.
translations.kjv: Mine eye affecteth mine heart because of all the daughters of my city.

verses.geez: ጻዴ። ንዒወ፡ ነዐዉኒ፡ ከመ፡ ዖፍ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፀርየ፡ በከንቱ።

translations.lxx: Tsade. The fowlers chased me as a sparrow, all mine enemies destroyed my life in a pit without cause,
translations.kjv: Mine enemies chased me sore, like a bird, without cause.

verses.geez: ወቀተሉ፡ ሕይወትየ፡ በውስተ፡ ዓዘቅት፡ ወከደኑኒ፡ እብነ።

translations.lxx: and laid a stone upon me.
translations.kjv: They have cut off my life in the dungeon, and cast a stone upon me.

verses.geez: ተክዕወ፡ ማይ፡ ላዕለ፡ ርእስየ፡ እቤ፡ ተኀድጉ፡ እምኔሁ።

translations.lxx: Water flowed over my head: I said, I am cut off.
translations.kjv: Waters flowed over mine head; then I said, I am cut off.

verses.geez: ቆፍ። ጸዋዕኩ፡ ስመከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ እምግብ፡ ታሕቲት።

translations.lxx: Koph. I called upon thy name, O Lord, out of the lowest dungeon.
translations.kjv: I called upon thy name, O LORD, out of the low dungeon.

verses.geez: ወሰማዕከኒ፡ ቃልየ፡ ወኢትሚጥ፡ እዝነከ፡ እምነ፡ እስለትየ።

translations.lxx: Thou heardest my voice: close not thine ears to my supplication.
translations.kjv: Thou hast heard my voice: hide not thine ear at my breathing, at my cry.

verses.geez: ቀረብከ፡ በዕለተ፡ እጼውዐከ፡ ወትቤ፡ ኢትፍራህ።

translations.lxx: Thou drewest nigh to my help: in the day wherein I called upon thee thou saidst to me, Fear not.
translations.kjv: Thou drewest near in the day that I called upon thee: thou saidst, Fear not.

verses.geez: ሬስ። ኰነንከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ኵነኔ፡ ነፍስየ፡ ወቤዘውከ፡ ሕይወትየ።

translations.lxx: Rechs. O Lord, thou hast pleaded the causes of my soul; thou hast redeemed my life.
translations.kjv: O LORD, thou hast pleaded the causes of my soul; thou hast redeemed my life.

verses.geez: ርኢከ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዘይመክሩ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ፈታሕከ፡ ፍትሕየ።

translations.lxx: Thou hast seen, O Lord, my troubles: thou hast judged my cause.
translations.kjv: O LORD, thou hast seen my wrong: judge thou my cause.

verses.geez: ርኢከ፡ ኵሎ፡ ተበቅሎቶሙ፡ ወኵሎ፡ ሕሊናሆሙ፡ ብየ።

translations.lxx: Thou hast seen all their vengeance, thou hast looked on all their devices against me.
translations.kjv: Thou hast seen all their vengeance and all their imaginations against me.

verses.geez: ሳን። ሰማዕከ፡ ኵሎ፡ ጽዕለቶሙ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ወኵሎ፡ ሕሊናሆሙ፡ ላዕሌየ።

translations.lxx: Chsen. Thou hast heard their reproach and all their devices against me;
translations.kjv: Thou hast heard their reproach, O LORD, and all their imaginations against me;

verses.geez: ወዘአሖሱ፡ ከናፍሪሆሙ፡ ብየ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዕለተ።

translations.lxx: the lips of them that rose up against me, and their plots against me all the day;
translations.kjv: The lips of those that rose up against me, and their device against me all the day.

verses.geez: ንብረቶሙ፡ ወተንሥኦቶሙ፡ ርኢ፡ አነ፡ ማኅሌቶሙ።

translations.lxx: their sitting down and their rising up: look thou upon their eyes.
translations.kjv: Behold their sitting down, and their rising up; I am their musick.

verses.geez: ፍድዮሙ፡ ወተበቀሎሙ፡ በከመ፡ ምግባረ፡ እደዊሆሙ።

translations.lxx: Thou wilt render them a recompence, O Lord, according to the works of their hands.
translations.kjv: Render unto them a recompence, O LORD, according to the work of their hands.

verses.geez: ታው። ሀቦሙ፡ ሕማመ፡ ልብ፡ ወመርገምከ።

translations.lxx: Thau. Thou wilt give them as a covering, the grief of my heart.
translations.kjv: Give them sorrow of heart, thy curse unto them.

verses.geez: ስድዶሙ፡ በመዐትከ፡ ወአጥፍኦሙ፡ እምታሕተ፡ ሰማይ፡ እግዚኦ፡ በከመ፡ እከየ፡ ልቦሙ።

translations.lxx: Thou wilt persecute them in anger, and wilt consume them from under the heaven, O Lord.
translations.kjv: Persecute and destroy them in anger from under the heavens of the LORD.
